title: Sabine Mauderer: Preserving stability in a fragmented and uncertain world
body:
Speech by Dr Sabine Mauderer, First Deputy Governor of the Deutsche Bundesbank, at the 3rd International Conference on the Climate-Macro-Finance Interface "Emerging macroeconomic, financial, and environmental policy challenges in an era of polycrisis and rising uncertainties," Frankfurt am Main, 23 March 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260325b.htm

title: Yannis Stournaras: The Greek economy ten years after the crisis - lessons for national economies, the eurozone and future challenges
body:
Speech by Mr Yannis Stournaras, Governor of the Bank of Greece, at the "American Hellenic Educational Progressive Association" event, Frankfurt am Main, 19 March 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260324b.htm

title: François Villeroy de Galhau: Private markets - three conditions to get the good without the bad or the ugly
body:
Speech by Mr François Villeroy de Galhau, Governor of the Bank of France, at the Bloomberg Forum Future of Finance, Paris, 12 March 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260317a.htm

title: Olaf Sleijpen: Standing with Ukraine, strengthening Europe - resilience, growth and stability
body:
Speech by Mr Olaf Sleijpen, President of De Nederlandsche Bank, in a panel meeting with students at the National Bank of Ukraine, Kyiv, 16 February 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260317e.htm

title: Agnès Bénassy-Quéré: Speech - "Research conference on climate- and nature-related risks in the economic and financial systems"
body:
Speech by Ms Agnès Bénassy-Quéré, Second Deputy Governor of the Bank of France, at the Research conference on climate- and nature-related risks in the economic and financial systems, Paris, 12 March 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260317b.htm

title: Sabine Mauderer: Navigating climate risks in Southern Africa - the role of central banks
body:
Speech by Dr Sabine Mauderer, First Deputy Governor of the Deutsche Bundesbank, at the South African Reserve Bank (SARB)-Network for Greening the Financial System (NGFS) Research Conference "Navigating climate risks in Southern Africa", hosted by the SARB, Pretoria, 11 March 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260317d.htm
